title: JBCクラシックの後に・先駆けの刻印

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: HAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Some things can't be put into words. They can't
be understood when spoken. But...)

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(The qi flowing through the dirt can tell me! It's
showing me how Tarumae feels!)

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(And this passion is Acute's—the thoughts and
feelings she's carried and run with for so many
years!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(These are the true faces of the two battling to be
the best on the dirt track!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Amazing... Truly amazing.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Normally, you wouldn't be able to tell. You
wouldn't even be able to see it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea they were running with such passion
hidden inside.
choice_data_list: Great job out there! You really gave it your all.
Great job out there! You really gave it your all.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Yeah. Today was just the tip of the
iceberg.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: But I learned just how incredible dirt racers are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui has heightened her senses, making her
more susceptible to her environment. The passion
she felt today sinks in deep, moistening her eyes
with tears.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tarumae...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No words are exchanged. Not of praise, nor
encouragement. Because this is just the prelude.
And then...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. On the track, we're rivals. It'd be stranger if
we were buddy-buddy.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay, Rickey? You're not hurt anywhere,
are you?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Acute! You're such an angel!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how intense the race, Wonder Acute is
as kind-hearted as always.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I was overwhelmed by how incredible those two
were today. Still...
choice_data_list: You gained something from this, right?
You gained something from this, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I sure did! For one, I think I understand them a bit
better now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't just learn. I left something of my own,
too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. A memory of my running. Of me. Something
that will stick with them.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It might be faint, but I'm sure it will have an effect
in the upcoming Champions Cup.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui isn't only about the external landform!
It's about the internal compass, too! Just you wait
and see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rickey is back to her usual, cheerful self, and just
like that, the trio's first race together comes to an
end.
